eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Delta, MI; at 08:51 AM ON MAR 16, 2026 Effective until 02:51 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Extreme travel conditions exist in Delta County.  Do not travel unless it is an absolute emergency.  You may become stranded and response agencies may not be able to get to you.   Many roads, including major highways are impassible in certain locations.  Conditions are expected to remain hazardous until 8am on 3-17-2026 but all roads may not be cleared by that time.
